sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
💧 Deep hydration locks moisture into skin all day

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 🌟 Lightweight, non-sticky water-gel melts instantly on skin

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 ✨ Plumps skin for a fresh, dewy glow

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 🍍 Enriched with hyaluronic acid and fruit extracts
